nodes.name: White-breasted ground dove
nodes.summary: White-breasted ground dove（Alopecoenas jobiensis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-breasted ground dove。

nodes.name: 鸠鸽科
nodes.summary: 鸠鸽科（Columbidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: Santa Cruz ground dove

nodes.name: 波利尼西亞地鴿

nodes.name: 紫珠鸠属
nodes.summary: 紫珠鸠属（Alopecoenas）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联7种鸟类，如Wetar ground dove、Shy ground dove、Santa Cruz ground dove等7种鸟类。

nodes.name: 白喉地鳩

nodes.name: Shy ground dove

nodes.name: Wetar ground dove
